headline: BoE May Kill 90% of Pound Stablecoins Overnight

article.title: UK Lords warn BoE could regulate pound stablecoins into irrelevance
article.summary: A UK House of Lords committee warned that strict stablecoin rules could make pound sterling tokens commercially unworkable despite supporting regulation.

headline: Lawmakers Oppose 401(k) Crypto Plan Amid $1.7T Fears

article.title: US lawmakers push back on Labor Department plans to include crypto in 401(k)s
article.summary: The three members of Congress said the volatility of digital assets and “lack of regulation and safeguards” could put Americans’ retirement savings at risk.

headline: Oasis Opposes Japan AGM Plan Harming 30% Retail Holders

article.title: Oasis Says Japan AGM Proposal Hurts Retail Investors
article.summary: Japan’s plan to tighten the threshold for shareholder proposals would hurt retail investors while having little impact on institutional activist investors, said Seth Fischer, the founder of Oasis Management Co.

headline: Oil Surges 4% as Iran Talks Stall Suddenly

article.title: Oil Extends Advance as US-Iran Peace Talk Progress Stalls
article.summary: Oil rose for a third day on pessimism over the prospects of the US and Iran reaching a peace deal and as fresh fighting flared up in the Middle East.

Bitcoin Magazine

Democrats Sanders and Warren Push Labor Department to Abandon Bitcoin 401(k) Rule
Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren are urging the U.S. Department of Labor under Donald Trump to withdraw a proposed rule allowing Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies in retirement accounts.

headline: US Sanctions 2 Iranian Crypto Exchanges Amid Terror Funding

headline: US Sanctions 5 Iranian Crypto Exchanges Overnight

article.summary: Sanctioned exchange Nobitex handled more than half of Iran's crypto inflows last year, according to the U.S. Treasury.
